tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control, suggestive of prediabetes or early diabetes. Chloride is slightly elevated and total CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may suggest a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Renal function, electrolytes, and glucose are otherwise within normal limits. Clinical correlation is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil

name.value: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
